ground_truth.title: Summit 24" Fire Pit
ground_truth.main_content:
Our most advanced. Lights 3x faster. Tallest, brightest flame. Seats 5–7 people.

Description

From the team that created the world's most popular smokeless outdoor fire pit comes our most advanced design yet—the new Solo Stove Summit 24™ Smokeless Fire Pit. Featuring taller, brighter, more mesmerizing flames, the new Summit isn't just powerful—it's a higher standard in smokeless. And it's also our easiest fire pit to use ever.

At the heart of the new Summit is the patent-pending Quick-Strike Cone™, a game-changing feature that delivers an easy-light fire in seconds. Start it your way: with classic kindling, or add optional Solo Stove Fire Starter Gel™ for a fire that lights up to 3x faster than traditional kindling. In just moments, you'll be enjoying effortless nights around the fire.

With upgraded smokeless technology and a low-profile fire pit design, the new Summit is designed to be our warmest fire pit experience, giving every gathering a front-row seat to the captivating Solo Stove Signature Flame™. It also features a built-in stand so you can use the new Summit on multiple surfaces. And with its premium construction, this stainless steel smokeless fire pit is durable, corrosion-resistant, and built for years of use. All backed by our lifetime warranty.

Pair the new Summit with Solo Stove Fire Starter Gel™ for reliable, hassle-free starts, and expand your setup with our full line of compatible 24-inch accessories—including Heat Deflector, Surround.

Dimensions & Materials

Summit 24™ Smokeless Fire Pit
Height: 39.1 cm (15.4 in)
Width: 62.5 cm (24.6 in)
Diameter: 62.5 cm (24.6 in)
Weight: 15.92 kg (35.1 lb)
Material: Stainless steel

Safety, Care, and Use

Fireside Experience, Upgraded

Stack small dry split wood horizontally around the Quick-Strike Cone™. Start with, about 5-6 split logs.

Pour the Solo Stove Fire Starter Gel™ onto the center of the cone until it collects in the three reservoirs at the base of the fire pit.

Add wood gradually over time to keep the fire going. Avoid over-stuffing the chamber or stacking above the vent holes, as this will block airflow and create smoke.

A little startup smoke is normal and clears quickly once your fire gets going.

Stainless Steel with Character

Over time, your stainless steel fire pit will develop a golden-blue patina—a natural part of its charm.

To keep it looking sleek, wipe it down with a soft brush or stainless-steel cleaner (no water or soap needed).

Burn Safe, Burn Smart

Always use your smokeless fire pit on a stable, non-flammable surface, away from: Overhangs, Patio ceilings (yes, even tall ones), Any other flammable materials.

Safety First

Never leave a lit fire unattended.

Hot Surface Warning: The exterior of your stainless-steel smokeless fire pit gets extremely hot during use—keep kids, pets, and anything flammable at a safe distance.

Always keep a fire extinguisher or water source nearby in case of emergency.

Easy Cleanup

Let your smokeless fire pit cool completely.
Remove the base plate to access the ash pan.
Dump the ashes, then put everything back in place.
Ready for your next burn.

Features & Benefits

Unrivaled Smokeless Tech
Summit 24™ delivers our cleanest burn yet. Powered by Signature 360° Airflow™ and an upgraded Secondary Burn system, this smokeless fire pit creates an ultra-clean, low-smoke fire.

Our Easiest Fire Pit to Use, Ever
Our new patent-pending Quick-Strike Cone™ is designed to help you start a fire with a single spark. This innovation makes lighting a wood fire simple and easy.

Our Tallest and Brightest Flame Yet
The Solo Stove Summit 24™ Smokeless Fire Pit features our mesmerizing, captivating Solo Stove Signature Flame™. With upgraded airflow, Summit creates the tallest and brightest flame compared to other top-selling competitors.

Built to Last
Crafted from premium stainless steel, the Summit 24™ is durable, corrosion-resistant, and made to be enjoyed with friends and family season after season.

Surface-Safe. Ready to Burn.
A built-in stand lets this portable fire pit burn safely on nearly any surface, including grass, turf, or decking.

Easy to Clean.
A removable ash pan lifts out with ease—no tools needed. Quick cleanup keeps your stainless steel smokeless fire pit ready for the next burn.

See More Flame
We designed Summit with a shorter wall to create a more open, immersive fire experience. With lower walls, you'll see more flame and still enjoy the smokeless burn.
